features: ALL-DAY CONFIDENCE: Take on busy days with confidence while taking care of your underarm skin when you use Sanex Men Active Control Antiperspirant Deodorant.
48-HOUR SWEAT PROTECTION: Our men’s antiperspirant helps to keep you fresh and feeling confident with 48 hours of sweat protection.
6-IN-1: Our antiperspirant deodorant for men delivers an impressive 6-in-1 benefits, including anti-odour, anti-sweat, long-lasting dryness, freshness, gentle on skin, antibacterial

ANTI-IRRITATION: Our antiperspirant men’s deodorant spray contains 0% alcohol* and is also designed for anti-irritation, helping to keep your underarm skin feeling comfortable, respected and looked after. (*Does not contain ethanol)
description: Product Description Sanex Men Active Control Antiperspirant Deodorant Spray keeps you confident with 48-hour sweat protection and 6-in-1 benefits including gentle on skin, anti-odour, dryness, freshness and antibacterial. Ingredients Isobutane Butane Propane Aluminum Chlorohydrate Cyclomethicone Dimethicone Parfum Disteardimonium Hectorite Propylene Carbonate Dimethiconol Directions Apply deodorant on clean, dry skin for long-lasting results. Shake your can of antiperspirant deodorant for men to mix all the ingredients then spray for about 3 seconds on each underarm at least 20cm away from your skin. It’s best not to apply the antiperspirant deo spray for men to sweaty skin or use it multiple times. However, if you need an extra boost throughout the day, you can top up on the go.
